data.name: Slime Girl Smoothies Encore!
data.detailed_description:
Slime Girl Smoothies is back for an Encore in a deluxe re-release of the game that introduced you to Berry, Cherry, Plum and Mint! This is more than just the original this is an after party and back alley goo job rolled into one for this love letter to Slime Girl Smoothies fans!  

You have been hired to work at Slimey's, a bar with a very unique way of serving drinks. Prepare to see a lot of jugs while mixing up some very wacky flavors. Berry, Cherry and coworkers Mint and Plum are ready to entertain each and every order! In this match style gameplay you are making drinks and getting a show with every order~

Using your bar skills, gather the ingredients the girls serve you. Combo together the customers favorite order by using your flavor chart and then let the girls use their special "jugs" to mix and serve and give evey patron a happy ending~

As orders come in you use your combo sheet to get the perfect mixing ratio. As you combine flavors the girls will talk to you and casually entertain you. Never feel pressured in making orders because you get sweet rewards for doing so. Complete the orders to further the story and learn more about the girls and the world of Slime Girl Smoothies.

- The Base Game Slime Girl Smoothies now with 20 new lewd unlocks, new menus and polish for an ENCORE!!!
- All three DLC's (Milkshakes with Lemon, Flambeau's Wax Play and Gamer Girl Goolay rolled into one!
- ALL NEW 'Oozy Origins' Chapter: New shifts with the girls unlocking four sexual encounters from their past~
- AFTER HOURS: Think you got what it takes? All 7 girls have new lewd rewards for trying their gauntlet of drinks!
- New Slime Girls to meet? The world expands with some new NPC characters!
- New Flavours: 4 New Drinks to test your tongue with~ Cherry Pie Pop, Berry’s Embrace, Winter Mint, Plum & Rum!
- New Voicework from IvyWilde, Kumbomb, MidnightDatura and Podgekinn with guests Suzy_Q and Deathblooms!
- Almost 200 frames of Animation and 12 new CG's doubling the work from PixelboyMagazin!​ 
- 7 New Unlockable Bio Image Pinups and backstories! 
- BEHIND THE BAR: All new gallery containing the original pitch, sketch animations and original linework
- Updated Fanart Gallery with art and comics spanning the past 4 years!
- TRY THESE AT HOME: Berry, Cherry and Plum's audio erotica drink mixing!
- 28 new Achievments bringing it to 52 in total!!!
- Remastered Music from Altered Ego with new Encore Track by 'pommchu'

-All characters in Slime Girl Smoothies Encore! are 18+

data.short_description: Slime Girl Smoothies is back with an extra thick load of content to serve up to you gooey gooners in a deluxe re-release of the game that introduced you to Berry, Cherry, Plum and Mint
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit).
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit).
  • 處理器: AMD: Radeon HD 7000 Series or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64Bit).
  • Processor: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
  • Sound Card: AMD High Definition
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64Bit).
  • Processor: AMD: Radeon HD 7000 Series or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce 700 series, Radeon HD 8000 Series
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
  • Sound Card: AMD High Definition
